nodes.label: VITOGRAPH — FastAPI application entry point.  Initialises the FastAPI app with
Thread-safe wrapper for lifespan initialization of TextEmbedding.      Prevent
Initialize the thread-safe lifespan wrapper for TextEmbedding.          Args:
Load the underlying TextEmbedding model thread-safely.
Generate embeddings for the input text using the loaded model.          Args:
Manage application startup / shutdown resources.      On startup, the fastembe
Pass through HTTPExceptions so they aren't caught by the global handler.
Catch all unhandled exceptions and log full traceback.
Deterministically recalculate flag based on numeric value and reference range.
Enrich biomarkers with AI clinical notes via semantic cache + LLM fallback.
Recalculate flags and generate concise AI clinical notes for updated biomarkers.
Upload PDF/DOCX/TXT -> Extract Biomarkers dynamically via AI.
Upload a PHOTO of a lab report -> OCR via GPT-4o Vision -> Extract Biomarkers.
Upload a batch of PHOTOS (up to 10) of a lab report -> OCR via GPT-4o Vision ->
Background: run OCR on images, save result to lab_scans table.      Args:
Initiate async batch OCR. Returns job_id immediately.
Polling fallback: check async OCR job status.
